title: jacobvalenzuela/Origin-of-biogeographically-distinct-ecotypes: Origin of biogeographically distinct ecotypes during laboratory evolution
author: Jacob Valenzuela
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This release contains all analytical code for the manuscript "Origin of biogeographically distinct ecotypes during laboratory evolution."
The release has all the files (DNA, RNA, FBA, and metadata-generated data files) needed to generate the plots using the scripts provided.
steps_raw:
